caption: The video appears to be an educational presentation on the topic of a rural community food system, focusing on sustainability and localization. The presenter, Gene Bellinger, is seen in a small window on the right side of the screen, wearing headphones and speaking about the content displayed. The main part of the screen shows a webpage titled "Rural Community Food System," which includes an introduction discussing the concept of a sustainable localized food system for rural communities. A diagram is prominently featured, illustrating various elements such as "13R Retailers willing to source local & Product Cost/Price" and "Local Sustainable Consumption." The diagram uses arrows and symbols to represent relationships and flows within the food system. The presenter seems to be explaining the connections and dynamics depicted in the diagram, likely aiming to educate viewers on how local retailers and consumption patterns can contribute to a sustainable food system. The session videos and references listed on the left side suggest that this is part of a series of presentations or discussions on the subject.
